name: OnMostPkt
title: OnMostPkt
description: When a packet is received over the Asynchronous Channel the OnMostPkt() event procedure is called.
The following functions are available for evaluating the event:
In nodal sequences (Measurement Setup) a received packet can be passed to the next node by the outputMostPktThis command.

parameters.name: pktdatalen
parameters.description: Number of data bytes of the packet.
